amendments.text: [(a) Each turbo-supercharger must be approved under the engine type certificate or it must be shown that the turbo-supercharger system-- (1) Can withstand, without defect, an endurance test of 150 hours that meets the applicable requirements of Sec. 33.49 of this subchapter; and (2) Will have no adverse effect upon the engine. (b) Control system malfunctions, vibrations, and abnormal speeds and temperatures expected in service may not damage the turbo-supercharger compressor or turbine. (c) Each turbo-supercharger case must be able to contain fragments of a compressor or turbine that fails at the highest speed that is obtainable with normal speed control devices inoperative.]
